summary: Iteration 9 testing completed successfully. All APScheduler and profit analytics features verified. Fixed profit-analytics API to include both 'income' and 'profit' transaction types for chart data.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint working
Backend: Admin login returns session_token and account_number
Backend: GET /api/scheduler/status returns running=true and job info
Backend: GET /api/scheduler/status requires admin authentication
Backend: POST /api/scheduler/run-now triggers profit accrual
Backend: POST /api/scheduler/run-now requires admin authentication
Backend: GET /api/user/profit-analytics returns monthly data with cumulative
Backend: GET /api/user/profit-analytics requires authentication
Backend: Login returns account_number (AC76743631)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns account_number
Backend: Transactions have type field for 'Доход' display
Backend: Portfolios have expected_return for yield display
Backend: Admin dashboard endpoint returns stats
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows scheduler status card 'Планировщик начислений'
Frontend: Scheduler status shows 'Активен' (Active) badge
Frontend: Scheduler shows job name 'Automatic Profit Accrual'
Frontend: Scheduler shows next run time (23.01.2026, 17:00:00)
Frontend: Scheduler shows trigger 'cron[minute=0]'
Frontend: 'Обновить' (Refresh) button present
Frontend: 'Запустить сейчас' (Run Now) button present
Frontend: Deposit modal shows account_number AC76743631
Frontend: Deposit modal shows 'Ваш номер счёта для пополнения' label
Frontend: History page shows 'Доход' for income/profit transactions
Frontend: History page shows transaction descriptions
Frontend: Dashboard profit chart shows 'История доходов' title
Frontend: Dashboard profit chart shows 'Реальные данные' badge
Frontend: Dashboard profit chart shows 'Общий доход: +$473,08'
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed profit-analytics API to include both 'income' and 'profit' transaction types
context_for_next_testing_agent: APScheduler is running with hourly profit accrual (cron[minute=0]). The scheduler creates 'income' type transactions. Profit-analytics API now includes both 'income' and 'profit' types for backward compatibility. Dashboard chart shows real profit data when available, otherwise shows forecast. Admin dashboard has scheduler status card with refresh and run-now buttons.

response.message: Profit accrual job started in background

response_structure.monthly: Array of 6 months with month, month_name, profit, count, cumulative

profit_analytics_api.fix_applied: Added 'profit' type to query filter for backward compatibility

details: Title changes to 'История доходов' when real data available
Chart shows cumulative profit over 6 months
